mapper.sql: content_id, subject_id, title, url, content_type, recommendation_slot, is_active, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content_recommendations ORDER BY subject_id ASC, recommendation_slot ASC, content_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE content_recommendations SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, title = #{title}, url = #{url}, content_type = #{contentType}, recommendation_slot = #{recommendationSlot}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE content_id = #{contentId}
